title: dendrolycopodium hickeyi
intro: Dendrolycopodium hickeyi, also known as Hickey's club moss, is a small, perennial plant that belongs to the lycopodiopsida division of plants. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its chemical composition. The health benefits of Dendrolycopodium hickeyi include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Dendrolycopodium hickeyi are typically made from its leaves and stems, which are dried and then used to create teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
